title: API Key Management
creator: Agent Buildprint
summary: A guarded Capability Buildprint for adding secure API key generation, keyed hash-only storage, scopes, revocation, rotation, API authentication, and audit proof to compatible SaaS apps.
promise: Gives coding agents a phased implementation contract for grafting API key management into an existing app without plaintext secrets, tenant bypasses, or fake verification.
includes: real host runtime receipt against a copied Bun API server
real host runtime receipt against a public Hono/Drizzle API starter
risks: Requires stable user, owner, or approved service-account identity
Requires server-side persistence for hash-only key storage
Existing token systems require an explicit migration decision
Bad scope or tenant checks can expose protected APIs
checks: Store only keyed/versioned hashes and non-secret metadata
Show full key secret only once
Verify valid, revoked, missing, malformed, valid-prefix/wrong-secret, and wrong-scope keys
Write capability receipt with proof level and blockers

trustBadges.label: Guarded capability
trustBadges.detail: Uses phased host assessment, planning, implementation, verification, and receipt.

trustBadges.label: Security risk declared
trustBadges.detail: Treats API keys as high-risk credentials with hash-only storage and scope proof.

trustBadges.label: Locally verifiable
trustBadges.detail: Can prove valid, revoked, malformed, valid-prefix/wrong-secret, and wrong-scope behavior with fixtures.

publicStatus.label: Runtime dogfooded
publicStatus.explanation: Created by dogfooding Buildprint Creator, then applied to copied real Bun and Hono/Drizzle API hosts with runtime tests for valid, revoked, missing, malformed, valid-prefix/wrong-secret, wrong-scope, and hash-only storage behavior.

whatYouGet: A bounded API key implementation contract
whatYouNeed: A compatible app with user identity or an approved service-account owner model
A persistence layer or approved persistence choice
At least one API route/action/controller to protect
Fixture keys or tests for lifecycle proof

howToUse.title: Load the packet
howToUse.detail: Use the package manifest and read BUILDPRINT.md first.

howToUse.title: Plan and graft
howToUse.detail: Write .buildprint/capability-plan.md, then implement each phase in order.

howToUse.title: Verify honestly
howToUse.detail: Prove valid, revoked, missing, malformed, valid-prefix/wrong-secret, and wrong-scope behavior, then record the actual proof level.

resultChecklist: API key schema stores keyed/versioned hash only
Selected API surface uses server-side key verification
Valid prefix with wrong secret body is denied
Audit or last-used evidence is recorded
Receipt records proof level and blockers
Real host dogfood receipts exist under examples/
